violations.text: The floors underneath shelving in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

Guests were observed walking through front cooking area and kitchen to access restroom. Persons unnecessary to the food establishment operation are not allowed in the food preparation, food storage, or warewashing areas. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Employee observed handling cash and then immediately donning gloves. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves and in between tasks that would require a handwashing step. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The cutting boards on the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

Laminate lined shelves above prep unit and pizza stations were observed in poor repair (composite wood exposed in several areas). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Handwashing sink faucet handle (left side) observed leaking when in use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The floors (especially under crates, racks and equipment) and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
